NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE LAW OFFICES OF DANIEL BERKO'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR THE DEFENDANT KENYA LEWIS' IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 28, 2011 FOR MOVING PARTY TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH ENDORSED FILED COURTESY COPIES OF ITS MOVING PAPERS NO LATER THAN 2/23/11 PER LOCAL RULE 2.6(B). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: MITCH LYON, CSR # 6840
